offerings.name: T Cloud Public (Open Telekom Cloud)
offerings.description: OpenStack-based sovereign public cloud with EU-only data centers, BSI C5, ISO 27001, and TISAX certifications, providing compute, storage, AI, and managed services.
offerings.usp: Sovereignty by Design with EU-only operations and no third-country access

offerings.name: Cloud Container Engine (CCE)
offerings.description: Enterprise-class managed Kubernetes service on Open Telekom Cloud with high-performance container orchestration and integrated storage/networking.
offerings.usp: Sovereign Kubernetes with BSI C5 attestation and OpenStack integration

offerings.name: Relational Database Service (RDS)
offerings.description: Managed database service on Open Telekom Cloud with 12 database flavors, performance analytics, and demand-oriented scaling.
offerings.usp: 12 database flavors with sovereign operation in EU data centers

offerings.name: Anti-DDoS Service
offerings.description: Cloud-native DDoS defense service on Open Telekom Cloud protecting against network-layer and application-layer attacks.
offerings.usp: Integrated sovereign cloud DDoS protection with EU-only traffic processing

offerings.name: Direct Connect (OTC)
offerings.description: High-speed, low-latency dedicated network connection linking on-premises data centers to Open Telekom Cloud infrastructure.
offerings.usp: Dedicated sovereign cloud interconnect with guaranteed latency
